text_original:
1 The feet of the lin: —
The noble sons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!
The noble grandsons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

3 The horn of the lin:—
The noble kindred of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

Ah! they are the lin!
The noble grandsons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

The noble kindred of our prince,
